scope: frontend state management, SPA navigation, cache preservation, and unnecessary refresh removal

before.recordBackBehavior: restore list shell then call loadData(), causing a network reload and scroll reset risk
before.cachedListBehavior: cache hit rendered quickly but also triggered background refresh
before.windowFocusBehavior: focus event called loadData({ forceRefresh: true }) for cached lists
before.listViews: fetched again when object page was rebuilt
before.recordHistory: record detail did not have record-aware browser history state
before.crossPageReturn: CRM state was memory-only and could be lost after visiting separate HTML pages

after.recordBackBehavior: restores from in-memory records/cache and scroll state without a network reload
after.cachedListBehavior: cache hit restores immediately without automatic background refresh
after.recordHistory: hash/history state supports object and record routes
after.crossPageReturn: CRM list/page/record caches are persisted to sessionStorage and restored on return

validation.authenticatedBrowserTiming: not run in this session because credentials/live user flow were not available

expectedTimings.cachedObjectReturn: memory render only; no list API request
expectedTimings.cachedRecordOpen: memory render only; no record API request
expectedTimings.manualRefresh: still calls loadData({ forceRefresh: true }) by explicit user action
expectedTimings.createEditDelete: still invalidates relevant object/record caches before refresh
